symbol: An old bridge over a beautiful stream is still in excellent condition
keynote: The enduring connection maintained by those who understood its value

symbol: A fat boy mows the grass with steady effort and good humour
keynote: Steady effort producing order in one's immediate domain

symbol: The pope blesses the faithful assembled in the great square below
keynote: Spiritual authority radiating outward to bless those who have gathered

symbol: An Indian chief claims power from the assembled and expectant tribe
keynote: Earned authority stepping forward when the community recognises it

symbol: Three stained-glass windows in a Gothic cathedral, one damaged by bombs
keynote: Beauty that endures through devastation by force of its own meaning

symbol: A group of people climbs into a large canoe for a journey by water
keynote: Shared voyage requiring the coordination of all those aboard

symbol: A party enters a large canoe for an expedition into unknown waters
keynote: The collective orientation that sets a group toward a common goal

symbol: Indians rowing a canoe and at the same time dancing a war dance
keynote: Physical effort and spiritual preparation as a single unified act

symbol: A dark archway and ten steps leading downward into unknown depths
keynote: The descent willingly entered, each step a choice toward the transformative

symbol: A veiled prophet speaks a word of lasting power to a small assembly
keynote: Wisdom clothed in mystery that protects its full force for the ready

symbol: Birds in a house fill even its corners with cheerful singing
keynote: The captive joy that finds its full song even within bounded spaces

symbol: An angel carrying a harp moves in radiant light
keynote: The sacred music of existence carried by those who serve the whole

symbol: An albatross feeds calmly from the hand of a seasoned sailor
keynote: Trust built across the boundary of the wild and the tamed

symbol: A large group of pheasants gather on a private estate
keynote: Natural abundance gathering on protected and carefully tended ground

symbol: An illustrated lecture on natural science reveals hidden aspects of life
keynote: Learning enriched by the image that makes the invisible visible

symbol: A fire worshipper meditates on the ultimate realities of existence
keynote: Devotion to the living flame as the symbol of life's central mystery

symbol: An ancient bas-relief carved in granite remains visible after millennia
keynote: Enduring form as memory: what was made with full attention outlasts time

symbol: Many toys are displayed in the children's ward of a hospital
keynote: Bringing joy into the difficult places as an act of love

symbol: Boys and girls in gymnasium suits prepare for vigorous exercise
keynote: The training of the body as preparation for the full demands of life

symbol: A young woman bathes nude in a secluded pool, unseen by anyone
keynote: The freedom of authentic selfhood unperformed for any audience

symbol: The Union Jack flag flies in the wind from a British warship
keynote: Identity and power displayed in the language all seafarers can read

symbol: A child of about five carries a huge shopping bag with proud determination
keynote: The great task borne by small forms that will grow to fill it

symbol: A hidden choir sings during a religious service, unseen but deeply felt
keynote: The unseen basis of beauty that undergirds all authentic ceremony

symbol: A relay race passes its baton through a line of dedicated runners
keynote: The transmission of effort through a lineage committed to a single goal

symbol: A general accepts defeat with grace, his dignity fully intact
keynote: The composure that elevates loss into an act of genuine character

symbol: Two athletic trophies are examined by a prospective buyer
keynote: The weighing of achievement against the standards of one's aspiration

symbol: A woman enters a convent at the beginning of a new phase of her life
keynote: Total renunciation freely embraced as the path to total dedication

symbol: An oriental rug dealer lays out intricate carpets for travellers to admire
keynote: Ancient patterns of beauty offered as sustenance to those passing through

symbol: A water sprite plays joyously in a mountain stream
keynote: The life force delighting in its own element before consciousness arrives

symbol: Pilgrims climb the steep steps leading to a mountain shrine at dawn
keynote: Sacred devotion expressed through the physical effort of ascent

symbol: A large aviary contains many colourful birds in ordered enclosure
keynote: The ordered arrangement that allows the display of variety's full beauty

symbol: A woman reads tea leaves in the quiet of a domestic kitchen
keynote: Subtle significance discovered in the simplest domestic residue

symbol: A secret meeting of men responsible for executive decisions of great scope
keynote: Collective power exercised in private beyond the sight of those it shapes

symbol: An old adobe mission stands at the edge of a desert
keynote: Ancient service enduring in the landscape it was built to transform

symbol: An unexpected thunderstorm brings intense lightning and rain
keynote: The revelation of hidden forces breaking through apparent calm

symbol: A deserter from the navy walks away from the fleet at dawn
keynote: The sacrifice of position made in the name of authentic calling

symbol: A Hindu pundit reveals his wisdom to a visiting scholar from another land
keynote: The cross-cultural transmission of wisdom to the earnest seeker

symbol: A council of elders and ancestors is called to guide a young man
keynote: The wisdom of deep lineage making itself available at the moment of choosing

symbol: A performer of mystery plays enacts sacred stories for the community
keynote: The sacred narrative that transforms both performer and witness

symbol: A child is seen to have the genius of his mother in a new guise
keynote: Inherited genius recognised in its next generational expression

symbol: Beautifully dressed wax figures are displayed in an elegant window
keynote: The perfection kept behind glass that cannot be approached or touched

symbol: A flag turns slowly into an eagle rising in the morning sky
keynote: Group identity awakening into the living freedom of individual spirit

symbol: A man made the embodiment of an ideal realises he is not the ideal itself
keynote: The cost of projection: the individual must eventually reclaim itself from the symbol

symbol: During a silent hour, a man receives inspiration that may change his life
keynote: The liminal access to revelation available only when all noise has ceased

symbol: People on stairs graduated upwards toward an unseen summit
keynote: Progressive ascension on a path whose end is not yet visible

symbol: A barometer predicts a change in the weather
keynote: Sensitivity to environmental change before it becomes undeniable

symbol: A train enters a long and dark tunnel
keynote: The courage to pass through uncertainty toward the light beyond

symbol: Two lovebirds sit on a fence singing joyously in the morning
keynote: Harmony as the natural state when two beings find their true match

symbol: A big businessman sits at his imposing desk surveying his domain
keynote: The mastery of material organisation that enables great enterprise

symbol: A watchmaker crafts a delicate timepiece with extraordinary precision
keynote: The painstaking precision required to master the measure of time itself

symbol: A man unmasks himself in the presence of those he has deceived
keynote: The courageous transparency that chooses truth over performance

symbol: A forest fire is subdued through the mastery of all available means
keynote: The collective mastery of natural force through co-ordinated intelligence

symbol: A large white dove bears a message in its beak
keynote: Peace as the harbinger whose arrival changes the climate of a situation

symbol: A woman in a hat and travelling clothes stands ready for departure
keynote: Readiness for departure as a state of being, not just a moment of leaving

symbol: A rug placed on the floor creates a safe space for children to play
keynote: The safe bounded space within which new growth can occur freely

symbol: A big bear sitting up waves its paws in the wind
keynote: Natural abundance inhabiting its own element without apology

symbol: A man turns his back on his passions and by that act teaches deep wisdom
keynote: Transcendence enacted visibly and thereby transmitted to those watching

symbol: A butterfly with an additional third wing on its left side
keynote: The gift of unexpected evolution that exceeds the known pattern

symbol: A hydrometer measures the specific gravity of an unknown liquid
keynote: The measurement of the invisible properties that determine substance's true nature

symbol: An ancient pottery bowl is filled to the brim with fresh violets
keynote: Old forms continuing to hold new beauty across the years

symbol: A tree is felled and sawed into boards for a house to be built
keynote: The transformation of the living into the useful in service of shelter

symbol: A spiritual brotherhood in which many minds merge in shared understanding
keynote: The collective consciousness where individual insight becomes communal wisdom

symbol: Moonlit fields, once bare and frozen, are now white with fallen snow
keynote: The silence of transformation that arrived between one moment and the next

symbol: A public market fills with the energy of exchange and abundance
keynote: The ceaseless flow of goods and meanings between those who meet

symbol: A squirrel hides in a tree as hunters move through the forest below
keynote: The protective instinct of the small and vital remaining alert

symbol: People crowd into a moving tram car at the end of the working day
keynote: Collective momentum carrying the many toward their individual destinies

symbol: Heavy traffic clogs a narrow isthmus between two coastal towns
keynote: The bottleneck as the place where two worlds press against each other

symbol: A church bazaar brings the community together in festive exchange
keynote: Spirit expressed through the festive commerce of communal life

symbol: Officers on dress parade display their finest bearing
keynote: Authority showing its best face in the ceremony of collective identity

symbol: A large cross lies on rocks surrounded by sea, illuminated by a shaft of light
keynote: Faith standing in the storm, held by the light that never leaves it

symbol: A girl blows a bugle to summon those who have not yet arrived
keynote: Young clarity sounding the call before those who need it know they do

symbol: A jockey rides with great skill to bring out the best in his horse
keynote: The masterful guidance of great natural force toward its full expression

symbol: An aviator in the clouds navigates by instruments alone
keynote: The discipline-guided flight through conditions that obscure the way

symbol: Men travel a narrow path seeking illumination through deep dark
keynote: The steep and narrow way that only the fully committed can sustain

symbol: Newly initiated members in the sanctuary of a brotherhood face their examination
keynote: The ordeal of genuine admission confirming those called to serve the whole

symbol: A sword used in many battles is now displayed in a museum
keynote: Power transformed into artifact: what once wounds now teaches

symbol: A lady wrapped in costly fox fur walks through the winter city
keynote: Instinct adorned as elegance, the animal self dressed in luxury

symbol: An officer prepares men carefully for a long journey by aeroplane
keynote: Meticulous preparation for the transcendent mission before departure

symbol: In the quiet of his study a creative individual is seized by inspiration
keynote: The protected interior space where the creative spirit flows unimpeded

symbol: An Easter rising: the ground blazes with the colours of spring flowers
keynote: Resurrection become visible in the glory of the living world

symbol: In a huge tent a famous revivalist draws the crowd into passionate renewal
keynote: Collective spiritual ignition through the power of one voice and many hearts

symbol: A master instructing his disciple in the silence of full understanding
keynote: The direct transmission that passes between those aligned in purpose

symbol: A table is set for an evening meal in an ordinary household
keynote: The ordinary ritual of gathering that consecrates the everyday

symbol: Under a servant's kind eye, a girl teaches a cook to make dumplings
keynote: Cross-cultural learning embodied in the shared task of making food

symbol: A man brings down the new law from the mountain, his face shining
keynote: Revelation shaped into living law for those who will receive it

symbol: A materialising medium gives a séance as forms appear in the smoke
keynote: Spirit given shape by the skilled attention of one who bridges worlds

symbol: An inhabited island rises from the sea, its lights visible at night
keynote: Humanity establishing its particular light in the vast surrounding dark

symbol: The purging of the priesthood restores integrity to sacred service
keynote: The cleansing of those entrusted with sacred duties when they have become corrupt

symbol: Watching the very thin crescent moon at sunset, many people feel blessed
keynote: The renewed beginning recognised and honoured in its most tender gesture

symbol: A harvest moon illuminates a clear autumnal sky
keynote: Completion and radiance arriving together at the season's full expression

symbol: A fertile field of unusual mushrooms grows in the morning mist
keynote: The earth's uncanny generativity producing what transcends the ordinary

symbol: Light breaks into many colours as it passes through a prism
keynote: The unity of white light revealed as the integration of all colour

symbol: A majestic rock formation resembling a face becomes a boy's ideal of greatness
keynote: The aspiration that shapes the self in the image of what it loves
